title: ToolTreaux Rotary Tool Accessories Kit with Revolving Stand Crafting Tools 276pc
description:
The ToolTreaux rotary tool accessories kit comes with 276 pieces including grindstones, grinding wheels, sandbelts, sandpaper, diamond burrs, and more. All of the included pieces are compatible with most standard dremel and rotary tools. The accessory tool kit comes with a durable plastic revolving stand to hold your accessories in place when not in use. Easily access the different tools depending on your rotary project needs. All of the accessories feature a 1/8“ shank and can be stacked on top of each other for convenience. These rotary tool accessories are great for a variety of applications including cutting, drilling, carving, grinding, polishing, sanding, and more. Utilize them on different surfaces like stone and ceramics

ToolTreaux Rotary Tool Accessories Kit with Revolving Stand Crafting Tools 276pc

The ToolTreaux rotary tool accessories kit comes with 276 pieces including grindstones, grinding wheels, sandbelts, sandpaper, diamond burrs, and more. All of the included pieces are compatible with most standard dremel and rotary tools.

Key Features

  • 276 ASSORTED ACCESSORIES - ToolTreaux rotary tool kit comes with a variety of 276 accessories including diamond burrs, grindstones, grinding wheels, sand belts, sand paper, and more. Accessories compatible with most standard rotary and dremel tools
  • INCLUDES REVOLVING STAND - Accessory tool kit comes with durable and sturdy plastic revolving stand that is both lightweight and portable; Easily access the different tools depending on your rotary project needs
  • 1/8 INCH SHANK - All accessories included feature 1/8 inch shank that will fit most dremel and rotary tools; stack the tools on top of each other for convenience
  • VARIETY OF USES - Rotary tool accessories are great for a variety of applications including carving, cutting, drilling, grinding, polishing, and sanding on different surfaces
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Materials: abrasive stone, sandpaper, diamond-coated burrs, plastic; Number of pieces: 276; Shank size: 1/8“; Stackable design

Product Specifications

  • MPN: TTROTA276PC
  • UPC: 810058486752
  • Color: Green
  • Size: Large

The accessory tool kit comes with a durable plastic revolving stand to hold your accessories in place when not in use. Easily access the different tools depending on your rotary project needs. All of the accessories feature a 1/8“ shank and can be stacked on top of each other for convenience.

These rotary tool accessories are great for a variety of applications including cutting, drilling, carving, grinding, polishing, sanding, and more. Utilize them on different surfaces like stone and ceramics. Make sure to grab this kit of rotary tools before your next hobby or crafting project!
